calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between J.A. Jr. And Peachtree Settlement Funding, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between J.A., Jr. And Peachtree Settlement Funding, LLC, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Request for dismissal of entire action filed April 9, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
